# GitHub Repository Metadata

Use this file as the source of truth for the GitHub "About" panel and repository topics.

## Suggested Description

Nature-first agent skills for drafting, revising, auditing, and resubmitting journal manuscripts, optimized for Nature-series workflows.

## Shorter Alternative

Nature-first agent skills for claim-driven manuscript writing, revision, submission preflight, and rebuttal for Nature-series journals.

## Suggested Topics

- `agent-skills`
- `scientific-writing`
- `paper-writing`
- `manuscript-revision`
- `journal-submission`
- `citation-verification`
- `research-workflow`
- `nature-series`
- `life-sciences`
- `computational-biology`
- `claude-code`
- `codex`

## Optional CLI Command

If you later install GitHub CLI, this command applies the same description and topics:

```bash
gh repo edit Boom5426/nature-paper-skills \
  --description "Nature-first agent skills for drafting, revising, auditing, and resubmitting journal manuscripts, optimized for Nature-series workflows." \
  --add-topic agent-skills \
  --add-topic scientific-writing \
  --add-topic paper-writing \
  --add-topic manuscript-revision \
  --add-topic journal-submission \
  --add-topic citation-verification \
  --add-topic research-workflow \
  --add-topic nature-series \
  --add-topic life-sciences \
  --add-topic computational-biology \
  --add-topic claude-code \
  --add-topic codex
```
